plugins.name: wiki-markdown
plugins.description: Markdown-backed AI-native wiki — filesystem-primary decision graph with deterministic CLI, task bridge nodes, integrity checks, and Claude/Codex agent policy scaffolding.

plugins.name: task-github
plugins.description: DefinitionArtifact 기반 자율 작업 프로토콜 — 선택적 GitHub 전체 기록과 wiki-markdown task 노드 연계

plugins.name: session-review
plugins.description: Wiki snapshot + git review-branch protocol for worker/reviewer loops with self-mode fast/audit profiles and turnkey completion.

plugins.name: studio
plugins.description: 살아있는 에이전트 팀 — QualityPlan, stable review cycle, evidence reuse와 delta/full QA gate로 품질을 지키면서 반복 handoff·검증 낭비를 줄인다. task-github/wiki-markdown은 agent-visible optional provider다.
